2024-08-18T06:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2024-08-18T06:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Fanling Highway and San Tin Highway, Yuen Long bound, near San Tin Interchange
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 粉嶺公路及新田公路，往元朗方向，近新田交匯處

2024-08-18T17:35:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate the works of Development of Lok Ma Chau Loop, from 11.00 p. m. on 19 August 2024 (Monday) to 4.00 a. m. of the following day, Fanling Highway and San Tin Highway (Yuen Long bound) near San Tin Interchange will be fully closed to all vehicular traffic. Affected vehicles are advised to travel via San Tin Interchange.
2024-08-18T17:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 因配合落馬洲河套地區發展工程，粉嶺公路及新田公路(往元朗方向)將於2024年8月19日(星期一)晚上11時至翌日凌晨4時全線封閉。駕駛人士須改經新田交匯處。

2024-08-19T13:35:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2024-08-19T13:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。
